about.0: We are an independent game development studio, passionate about creating unique and memorable experiences. Our journey began in 2020 with the goal of bringing innovative games that combine engaging narratives, creative mechanics, and stunning art.
about.1: At DeadPixel Studio, we believe every pixel tells a story. Our mission is to develop games that not only entertain, but also inspire and connect players worldwide. With a talented and dedicated team, we transform ideas into digital realities.
about.5: Meet the talented people who make all of this possible.
about.7: We believe that games are more than entertainment – they are an art form that can touch hearts, challenge minds, and create genuine connections between people.
about.8: Our vision is to create a portfolio of games that are not only fun but also leave a lasting mark on the industry. We want to be known for the quality, innovation, and passion we put into every project. Whether you're a casual or hardcore gamer, our goal is to provide experiences you'll remember for years.
about.9: We are committed to the gaming community, listening to feedback, constantly evolving, and always striving to exceed expectations. At DeadPixel Studio, every game is a new opportunity to create something extraordinary.

machick.1: The magic chicken against the evil frogs
machick.2: The return of the magic chicken
machick.3: A magical adventure starring Machick, a chicken with special powers who needs to save her coop from the evil frogs!
machick.4: The peaceful chicken coop has been invaded by evil frogs who want to dominate all the birds. Machick, a chicken with unique magical abilities, is the only hope! Use powerful spells, explore different environments, and confront horrible frogs in epic battles. With innovative magic mechanics and dynamic combat, Machick 1 offers a unique and fun experience.
machick.5: Machick returns more powerful! The threat of the evil frogs resurfaces, and now they have brought even more dangerous allies.
machick.6:
Years of peace have passed since Machick's victory, but the evil frogs return with redoubled forces and new dark allies.
Our heroine needs to gather new magical abilities and form a team of warrior birds to defend the kingdom.
Machick 2 expands on everything that made the original special, adding cooperative mode and new combat mechanics.

morse.markdown:
# Create and Manage Morse Code Audio for RPGs

Add an authentic and mysterious touch to your sessions with **Morse code audio for RPGs**. This innovative tool allows you to create coded messages that challenge players to think outside the box, enhancing immersion and the atmosphere of investigation in your tabletop games.

## What is Morse Code?

**Morse code** is a coding system developed in the 19th century by Samuel Morse and Alfred Vail. It converts letters and numbers into a series of short and long signals — the famous "dots" and "dashes" — that can be transmitted by sound, light, or electrical pulses.

Originally created for long-distance telegraphic communication, Morse code was vital for military, maritime, and emergency transmissions over time.  Although its use has decreased with the modernization of communications, it remains a classic symbol of secret and encrypted messages.

## Applications of Morse Code in Tabletop RPGs

In RPGs, Morse code is a creative resource for introducing **secret messages for RPGs**, puzzles, or even mysterious communications between characters. It can be used in several ways:

- As part of a **sound puzzle for RPGs**, where players must translate the sound to discover a clue.
- In background tracks with intermittent transmissions that increase the atmosphere of tension.
- As a method of communication between NPCs, provoking suspicion or revelations.

## Generate Secret Messages with Ease

With our **encrypted audio for RPGs** tool, you can transform any phrase into a realistic Morse code sound sequence. Ideal for investigative, horror, or science fiction narratives, this function helps game masters create captivating auditory challenges for their players.

## Immersion Through Sound

By integrating **Morse code audio for RPGs** into your sessions, you offer players a new layer of immersion. The genuine and configurable sound (in tone and speed) contributes to a more dynamic and sensory game environment, stimulating reasoning and collaboration among participants.

## Customize for Your Sound Puzzle

Each element of the message can be adjusted to match the style of the adventure. If your campaign involves espionage, retro technology, or secret societies, **Morse code in narrative games** adapts perfectly to the desired tone.

## Compatible with Various RPG Systems

Our tool is flexible and can be used with any game system. From D&D to independent narratives, **Morse code audio for RPGs** adds depth and innovation to your creations, whether in long campaigns or one-shots.

0.md:
**Dungeons & Dragons** (D&D) is one of the most renowned tabletop RPGs in the world, offering epic adventures and fantasy worlds filled with mystical creatures, courageous heroes, and menacing villains. For many, D&D is the ultimate RPG experience, where each game session becomes a unique story, collectively built by the players and the game master.

## What is Tabletop RPG?

A **tabletop RPG** (Role-Playing Game) is a type of game where players assume the roles of fictional characters and create collective stories based on predefined rules. Unlike digital games, tabletop RPGs are played primarily through verbal interaction and imagination, where players make decisions, interact with the environment, and face challenges while the game master narrates the events.

The goal of a tabletop RPG is not to win, but to create an engaging story where characters evolve with the players' decisions, which, in turn, influence the unfolding of the plot. The game master (or Dungeon Master in D&D) is responsible for creating the world, describing the setting, and playing the NPCs (non-player characters), guiding the players through the adventure.

## The Setting of Dungeons & Dragons

In Dungeons & Dragons, players explore **fantasy worlds** filled with myths, magic, and mysteries. Stories take place in vast and diverse settings, which can include ancient dungeons, mysterious forests, medieval kingdoms, and even cosmic planes. Each setting is unique, with its own rules, factions, creatures, and stories that intertwine with the characters' actions.

D&D is a **high fantasy** game, which means it takes place in a world where magic is a natural part of the environment. Wizards, warriors, elves, dragons, and legendary monsters are just a few of the elements you'll find when playing. The D&D universe is vast, and each game can lead players to explore new realms, face challenges, or seek magical artifacts on epic quests.

## Classes in Dungeons & Dragons

One of the most exciting parts of Dungeons & Dragons is character creation. Each player chooses a **class** that defines the abilities and role they play in the adventure. Among the most popular D&D classes are:

-   **Warrior**: A skilled combatant who specializes in fighting with weapons and armor.
-   **Wizard**: A master of the arcane arts, capable of casting powerful spells and controlling magic.
-   **Rogue**: An expert in stealth and thievery skills, perfect for exploring dungeons and solving puzzles.
-   **Cleric**: A divine being, capable of healing wounds and invoking divine powers to aid allies and face enemies.
-   **Archer**: A master of ranged combat, using bows and arrows with great skill.
-   **Barbarian**: A fierce warrior with immense physical strength, often driven by fury in combat.

These are just a few of the available classes. Each offers a unique experience, with its own abilities and characteristics that directly impact the way you play.

## Dungeons & Dragons on Discord: How Does It Work?

The experience of playing **Dungeons & Dragons** on **Discord** can be as engaging as playing at a physical table. Discord offers an interactive platform that allows players to communicate via voice, text, and even video, creating a perfect environment for D&D adventures.

To play D&D on Discord, you need to use additional tools to facilitate the process. This can include bots that automate tasks like rolling dice or managing character sheets, saving time and keeping the focus on the narrative and action.

## How to Play D&D on Discord?

To start playing Dungeons & Dragons on Discord, you need to set up your server with the right tools. There are bots like **Mini Kraken**, which help automate dice rolling and character sheet management. This makes the game more agile and allows all players to focus more on their actions and the story, without worrying about complex calculations or rules.

### Tips to Maximize Your Game Experience

In addition to tools, organizing the Discord server is also essential. Creating separate channels for different aspects of the game, such as combat, roleplay, or exploration, can help keep the session more fluid and organized.

Another important point is collaboration with other players. Discord facilitates real-time communication, allowing all players to actively engage in story decisions. Furthermore, the platform allows you to connect with other D&D fans and exchange experiences, tips, and even create game groups.

## Conclusion: The Magic of Dungeons & Dragons on Discord

Dungeons & Dragons is a rich and immersive experience, and Discord offers the ideal platform to explore this fantasy world with friends, even remotely. By using the right tools and organizing your sessions well, you can create epic adventures full of magic, mystery, and excitement.

If you're ready to embark on a D&D journey, Discord is the perfect place to gather your friends and create unforgettable stories. With a little preparation and organization, you'll be ready to explore dungeons, conquer kingdoms, and face incredible monsters — all without leaving home.

[Learn more about Mini Kraken and how it can enhance your gaming experience.](https://rpg.arkanus.app/)

1.article: Paranormal Order is a new tabletop role-playing game that transports players to a world filled with mysteries and supernatural phenomena. In this dark and compelling setting, hidden secrets and evil entities threaten humanity, and only the brave agents of the Paranormal Order can face these threats.In the game, players take on the role of paranormal agents, members of a secret organization dedicated to protecting the world from the dangers of the unknown. Each agent has special abilities, such as clairvoyance, energy control, mediumship and keen perception, which help them face the supernatural challenges they encounter on their path.As players progress through missions, their characters gain experience and develop new paranormal abilities, becoming more proficient in facing the supernatural. Character evolution allows players to customize their skills according to their play style and prepare for even greater challenges.Paranormal Order offers an exciting and immersive experience for tabletop RPG fans and lovers of supernatural stories. With its engaging plot and captivating mechanics, the game promises to transport players to a world of suspense and mystery, where they will have to use their intelligence and courage to protect humanity from forces beyond.Get ready to face the unknown and discover dark secrets as you play Paranormal Order. Gather your friends, choose your paranormal abilities and embark on this exciting adventure where the line between the real and the supernatural becomes blurred. The fate of the paranormal world is in your hands!

card.desc: A universe of paranormal investigation, where agents fight the supernatural and protect our reality.
card.title: Ordem Paranormal

1.md:
## Unveiling the Paranormal Order RPG System: A Journey into the Supernatural

The world of **tabletop RPGs** is vast and immersive, allowing players to participate in interactive stories where their choices shape the unfolding events. Within this genre, **Paranormal Order** stands out for its modern and dark setting, focused on mysteries, investigations, and confrontations with the supernatural.

## What is a Tabletop RPG?

A **tabletop RPG (Role-Playing Game)** is a cooperative game where participants play characters within a narrative guided by a game master. Player decisions directly influence the unfolding story, using specific rules and mechanics to define successes or failures. The experience is immersive, combining role-playing, strategy, and creativity.

## What is Paranormal Order?

**Paranormal Order** is a tabletop RPG set in the contemporary world, where supernatural events threaten reality and need to be investigated and combated. Players take on the roles of agents of the **Ordo Realitas**, a secret organization dedicated to confronting these threats before they become irreversible catastrophes. The system blends horror, investigation, and action, challenging players to survive and unravel hidden secrets.

## The Membrane and the Supernatural

Reality in **Paranormal Order** is protected by an invisible barrier called the **Membrane**, which separates the physical world from the supernatural. When this barrier weakens, distortions, possessions, and manifestations of unknown entities occur. Ordo Realitas agents need to identify the flaws in the Membrane and prevent chaos from spreading.

## Mechanics and Character Classes

The **Paranormal Order** system offers different classes for players to build their characters, each with specific abilities:

- **Combatant**: Expert in combat and protection, directly confronts paranormal threats.
- **Specialist**: Master of technology and investigation, essential for analyzing clues and using equipment.
- **Occultist**: Able to interact with the supernatural, using mystical powers to help or defend themselves.

Each class has specialization paths that allow for further customization of character abilities, making the experience rich and diverse.

## Digital Tools: The Mini Kraken Support

To make gameplay smoother, especially in online sessions, tools like **Mini Kraken** can be great allies. This bot facilitates dice rolling and character sheet organization within platforms like Discord, allowing game masters and players to focus on the narrative without worrying about manual calculations or scattered notes.

## Tips for a More Immersive Experience

- **Create a Deep Character**: Develop a backstory and motivations that make the experience more engaging.
- **Use Fear to Your Advantage**: Paranormal Order is an investigative horror game, and fear is part of the experience. Don't be afraid to let your character feel the weight of the atmosphere.
- **Teamwork is Essential**: Each class has an essential role. Cooperating and sharing information can be the key to surviving the threats beyond the Membrane.

2.article: Tormenta20, the acclaimed tabletop RPG, is back with a new edition that promises to immerse players in an epic fantasy world full of emotions. Since its original release, Tormenta has captured the imagination of RPG fans with its captivating stories, striking characters, and dynamic rules.In the new edition, Tormenta20 continues to explore the vast continent of Arton, a rich and vibrant setting with a unique mythology. Players have the freedom to create their own heroes, choosing from a wide variety of races and classes, from honorable warriors to powerful wizards and cunning rogues.The game mechanics are based on an updated rules system that combines simplicity and strategic depth. Players face exciting challenges, solve intriguing puzzles, and battle dangerous creatures in tactical battles. Character progression allows them to acquire special skills and powers, becoming true legendary heroes.With its enduring legacy and dedicated fan base, Tormenta20 continues to captivate players of all ages and experience levels. Whether you're a veteran of role-playing games or a beginner looking for a great adventure, Tormenta20 offers a gateway to a fantastic world filled with heroes, magic and imminent dangers.So get ready to embark on an unforgettable journey with Tormenta20. Choose your race, forge your destiny and face epic challenges in a fantasy world that awaits your courage. Gather your friends, get your data and embark on this exciting adventure. Arton's fate is in your hands!

3.article: Carbon 2185 is a tabletop role-playing game set in a dystopian, cyberpunk future. In the year 2185, Earth is in ruins due to climate change and war. Powerful megacorporations control society and advanced technology is ubiquitous. Players take on the role of "Operatives," highly trained individuals who undertake missions to combat injustice and uncover the world's dark secrets.Character Customization: Players can choose between different archetypes, such as hackers, mercenaries, spies, or melee fighters, each with unique abilities.Skill Development: Throughout the game, players can enhance their characters' cybernetic capabilities and acquire futuristic weapons.Decision-making: Players' choices influence the direction of the narrative, allowing them to shape the fate of the world within the game.Dice roll system: The game uses dice rolls and attributes to determine the success of actions and combats.

card.desc: A cyberpunk RPG set in a dystopian future, influenced by Blade Runner and Ghost in the Shell.
card.title: Carbon2185

3.legal: The Carbon 2185 System was created by Robert Marriner-Dodds and is currently published by [Dragon Turtle Games](https://www.dragonturtlegames.com) which has all its rights reserved. The system's books were published under the license [OPEN GAME LICENSE Version](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open_Game_License#Open_Game_License) 1.0a Mini Kraken has the explicit consent of the system's creator.

4.article: Gaia: The Prelude is the newest modern reimagining of the tabletop RPG, bringing a medieval high fantasy setting to the magical world of Auroria. On Gaia you will be unique, walking a path forged by yourself, unlocking the locks of the Veil towards infinity.On Gaia, you can be whatever you want. There are twenty-one Legacies that define your character's appearance in addition to a fully customized hybrid combat system. Create your personality in your own way: A warrior who destroys armies, but who studies the secrets of the Veil in his free time?Separate what you do best in and out of combat as you wish.During your adventure, unlock the Veil within you by facing unique creatures from the Homuncularium, a unique monster creation system, with billions (literally) of possible combinations! And of course, you will be rewarded for this, with Learning Points that will make you acquire new powers, new skills, on the Combat Paths.The Combat Paths allow you to shape your character in your own way, meaning that a character does not need to follow just one Path, but rather, choose his own way.There are five starting Basic Paths that contain dozens of skills to choose from, and each skill can also be improved with one of three Enhancement options. And in the future, when you evolve your character you will be able to access Advanced Paths that bring hundreds of new skills that further enhance your experience.

card.desc: Medieval high fantasy RPG, with a modern and simplified system, where each character is unique.
card.title: Gaia: The Prelude

4.legal: Gaia: The Prelude is developed by Auroria - Game Studio, which has all its rights reserved.The system's books were published under the license [OPEN GAME LICENSE](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open_Game_License#Open_Game_License) Version 1.0a, and are protected by the CBL (Brazilian Book Chamber)The Mini Kraken has the knowledge and authorization of the author Lyy to operate, in addition we recommend that you purchase the book and support its financing project at [CATARSE](https://www.catarse.me/gaiapreludio)

5.article: 3DeT Victory: The new RPG system that is capturing players' imaginations Since its creation, thousands of adventurers have ventured into limitless scenarios, creating unique characters and exploring fantastic worlds. Now, with the arrival of the Age of Arks, you can immerse yourself in an urban fantasy filled with dimensional mazes, each with their own dangers and treasures. Choose between the five themed cores and get ready for an epic journey. The 3DeT Victory Manual, containing complete rules, the Age of Arks scenario and previews of the thematic cores, is in crowdfunding on Catarse. Join this new era and be part of this exciting adventure!3DeT Victory offers a series of innovative mechanics that make the gaming experience exciting and immersive. Here are some of the main features and advantages of the system:Simplicity and Flexibility: The system was designed to be accessible to players of all experience levels. The rules are intuitive and easy to learn, allowing you to quickly dive into the action. Additionally, the flexibility of the system allows you to adapt the mechanics as needed to suit your playstyle.Narrative in Focus: 3DeT Victory puts narrative at the center of the game. The mechanics encourage the creation of captivating stories, with room for improvisation and creativity. Players can shape the world, develop complex characters, and explore intriguing plots.Thematic Cores: The five thematic cores offer variety and depth to the system. Each core features specific rules, unique characters and distinct challenges. Whether you're a space adventurer, a secret agent or a fantasy hero, there's a core for everyone.Age of Arks: The setting of Age of Arks is a fusion of fantasy and urban elements. The dimensional labyrinths called Arks are full of mysteries, strange creatures and hidden treasures. This setting offers endless possibilities for exploration and adventure.Complete Manual: The 3DeT Victory Manual is a complete source of information. In addition to the basic rules, it presents details about Age of Arks, master tips, adventure suggestions and previews of thematic cores. It's an essential guide for players and GMs alike.In short, 3DeT Victory combines simplicity, creativity and a rich setting to provide a unique RPG experience. Join the community and discover a world of possibilities!

card.desc: Heroes and villains clash in epic battles. Magic, technology and fantastic creatures collide.
card.title: 3DET Victory

6.article: Pathfinder is a tabletop role-playing game that captivates the imagination with its rich narrative and tactical complexity. In Pathfinder, each player creates a unique character, choosing from a variety of races and classes, each with their own special abilities and backstories. Players embark on epic adventures, facing challenges that require both cunning and brute strength. The game is governed by a set of rules that help shape the world and the characters' interactions with it, but the true magic of Pathfinder lies in the freedom players have to shape their own stories.As a role-playing game, Pathfinder allows for unprecedented creative collaboration between players and the Game Master, who serves as narrator and arbiter of the rules. Together, they build a dynamic storyline that can change based on player decisions and dice rolls. This aspect of the game encourages players to delve deeply into their characters and the world around them, creating an immersive and personal experience.Additionally, Pathfinder is known for its detailed customization system, where players can tweak their characters with a wide range of skills, spells, and equipment. This allows each character to become truly unique, reflecting the player's choices and play style. With each session, characters grow in power and complexity, facing ever greater threats and uncovering mysteries that could change the game world.The world of Pathfinder is a place of wonder and danger, inhabited by mythical creatures and diverse peoples. From the depths of the darkest dungeons to the highest mountain peaks, Pathfinder's heroes explore unknown territories, discover ancient civilizations, and battle evil forces. With each adventure, they have the opportunity to acquire legendary treasures and forge their own destiny.In short, Pathfinder is more than a game; It is a gateway to fantasy worlds where imagination knows no limits. It is an invitation to tell collective stories where each choice has weight and each moment can become a lasting memory. Whether you're a meticulous strategist or a passionate storyteller, Pathfinder offers a rich, rewarding experience that unfolds in ways as unique as the players who come together to play.

card.desc: The story of brave heroes and cunning villains in a world full of terrible monsters and wonderful treasures.
card.title: Pathfinder

7.article: Sorcerers and Curses offers an immersive experience that captures the essence of the Jujutsu Kaisen anime, allowing players to immerse themselves in a world where sorcerers combat curses with supernatural abilities. Through a detailed ranking system, players can develop their characters from rank 4 novices to powerful special rank sorcerers. With mechanics like multiclassing and varied equipment, the game encourages customization and strategy. Additionally, unique elements like Integrity and Boundary Vows add depth and challenge, inviting players to make meaningful choices that shape their journeys. For RPG enthusiasts looking for an adventure full of magic and mystery, "Wizards and Curses" is a gateway for anime fans who want to start playing role-playing games.

With clear and concise rules, Dharmar is an excellent option for beginners and veteran players looking for an engaging and dynamic RPG experience. If you are looking for an accessible, fun and versatile RPG system, Dharmar is the perfect choice for you. Gather your friends, create your characters and embark on an epic adventure with Dharmar!

9.md:
# Old Dragon 2nd Edition: Revitalizing the Classic RPG with Modern Tools

## Introduction

**Old Dragon 2nd Edition** is a significant update to the renowned Brazilian RPG that aims to recapture the essence of classic tabletop games, incorporating improvements that cater to both veteran and new players. With new rules, settings, and digital integrations, this edition promises to enrich the gaming experience, maintaining the nostalgia and simplicity that characterize the original system.

## General Context

Initially launched in 2010, Old Dragon quickly stood out in the national RPG scene for its "old school" approach, inspired by early role-playing systems. The second edition emerges after more than a decade of community feedback, aiming to improve mechanics, expand the game's universe, and integrate tools that facilitate gameplay in virtual environments.

Furthermore, **Old Dragon 2nd Edition** is now part of the **Mini Kraken** system list, a platform dedicated to independent RPGs. This expands access to the game and strengthens its presence in the digital landscape, making it easier for new players and game masters seeking classic and accessible experiences to get involved.

## Main New Features of the 2nd Edition

- **Rules Revision**: The mechanics have been refined to provide a more fluid experience, while maintaining the system's characteristic simplicity.
- **New Setting – Valansia**: Introduction of the continent of Valansia as the default setting, offering a vast territory of approximately two thousand hexagons for exploration and adventures.
- **Free Digital Availability**: The Core Rulebook and a Fast Play are available for free in digital format, democratizing access to the game.

## Integration with Virtual Platforms

Recognizing the growing popularity of virtual tables, Old Dragon 2nd Edition has integrated with major online RPG platforms:

### Roll20

The specific Old Dragon 2nd Edition character sheet on Roll20 allows:

- **Custom Creation**: Develop characters, spells, and items intuitively.
- **Automatic Modifier Calculation**: Speeds up the process of character creation and development.
- **Improved Dice Rolls**: Facilitates attribute tests, protection rolls, and attacks.

While some features still require manual entry, the tool already represents a significant advancement in character management.

### Mini Kraken Bot

The **Mini Kraken Bot** is an innovative tool that facilitates Old Dragon 2nd Edition gameplay directly on Discord. With practical commands and automations, it allows:

- **Character Creation and Management**: Register character sheets, evolve attributes, and track your campaign in an organized manner.
- **Intelligent Dice Rolls**: Use quick commands to perform attribute tests, protection rolls, and attacks, without needing manual calculations.
- **Session Recording**: Store important campaign notes, ensuring that no detail is lost between sessions.

The bot is available for free and is an excellent option for those who want to play quickly without relying on more complex platforms.

## Tips to Maximize Your Experience

- **Participate in the Community**: Engage in forums and groups dedicated to Old Dragon to share experiences and get support.
- **Explore the Valansia Setting**: Take advantage of the richness of detail and possibilities that the new continent offers to create engaging campaigns.
- **Use Virtual Tools**: Familiarize yourself with the features of Roll20 and Mini Kraken Bot to optimize your game sessions.

## Conclusion

The second edition of Old Dragon revitalizes the classic Brazilian RPG, combining tradition and innovation. Whether you are an experienced player or a curious newcomer, this edition offers resources and tools that enrich the gaming experience. Don't miss the opportunity to explore the new features and join this vibrant community. Access the free materials, try out the virtual platforms, and embark on new adventures with the old dragon.

**Keywords**: Old Dragon 2nd Edition, classic Brazilian RPG, Valansia, Roll20, Mini Kraken, Mini Kraken Bot

privacy.desc: Read the Privacy Policy for Mini Kraken. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your data.
privacy.md:
This document explains how Mini Kraken, owned by the Developers, collects, manages, and protects your data.

## Information Collected

When using the application, we collect information from you and the server, as well as other data you provide us. This includes, but is not limited to:

* **User and guild names, IDs, and images.**
* **Internal application data**, such as the RPG sheet system.

The only situation where message content is collected is in the dice roll system without the use of slash commands. **Important**: This message content is not stored, and the developers do not have access to it.

The processing of this data is essential for the functioning of various application features, such as:

* Identification to save information in the database.
* Individual application settings for each guild and user.
* Customization of the application interface for an improved experience.


## Your Rights

You have the following rights guaranteed regarding your data:

* **Right to be informed:** Knowing what data is collected and how it is used.
* **Right to rectification:** Correcting inaccurate or incomplete data.
* **Right to erasure:** Requesting the deletion of your data.
* **Right of access:** Accessing the data we have about you.
* **Right to object:** Opposing the processing of your data.

By using the application, you agree to the terms and data collected.

## Information Security

We guarantee the security of the information you provide us. It is stored on servers and computers located in secure and controlled environments, protected against unauthorized access, use, and disclosure. We implement administrative, technical, and physical security measures to protect your data. However, it is important to remember that no data transmission over the Internet can be guaranteed to be totally secure.

## Contact

If you need more information about this Privacy Policy or wish to access your individual rights and personal information, you can:

* Open a support ticket in the guild (use the command /support).
* Send an email to **support@arkanus.app**.

## Telemetry

To improve and market our products/services, we partner with **Microsoft Clarity** and **Microsoft Advertising**. These tools allow us to capture how you use and interact with our website through:

* Behavioral metrics.
* Heatmaps.
* Session replays.

Website usage data is collected using first-party and third-party cookies and other tracking technologies. This helps us determine the popularity of products/services and online activity.  Additionally, we use this information for website optimization, security/fraud, and advertising. For more details on how Microsoft collects and uses your data, please see the [Microsoft Privacy Statement](https://www.microsoft.com/privacy/privacystatement).
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

tos.desc: Read the Terms of Service for Mini Kraken. Understand your rights and responsibilities when using our services.
tos.md:
## **Introduction**

Our team, hereinafter referred to as "the developers", is dedicated to developing a variety of projects and services. By accessing or using our services, you automatically agree to the terms, conditions and privacy policies presented here.

If you are of legal age in your jurisdiction, or if you are between 13 years of age and the age of majority and your legal guardian has reviewed and agreed to these Terms, you are bound by them. If you disagree with any part of these terms and conditions, please immediately stop using our services.

## **License of Use**

Unless expressly stated otherwise, all intellectual property rights in the content published on our Services belong to us and our licensors. All intellectual property rights are strictly reserved, and we reserve the right to take appropriate legal action through our official communication channels.

You are not authorized to:

* Sell, rent or sublicense any material related to our services or systems.

* Redistribute content from our services or systems without express authorization.

* Intentionally attempt to circumvent the security mechanisms of our Services in any way without prior authorization.

Some areas of our Services allow customization by users, without prior screening or review by us prior to publication. Comments and customizations reflect solely the opinions of their respective authors. To the extent permitted by applicable law, we are not responsible for these comments/customizations or for any damages, risks or expenses arising from their use, publication or appearance on our Services.

We reserve the right, without obligation, to remove any comment or customization that we consider inappropriate, offensive or in violation of these Terms and Conditions.

By using our Services, you agree to protect and defend us against all claims, lawsuits, damages, costs and expenses arising from or related to your use of the Services. No link should be inserted to any website that may be interpreted as defamatory, obscene, criminal or that violates the rights of third parties.

By posting comments, customizations, or other content to our Services, you represent and warrant that:

* You have the legal right to post such content and have all necessary licenses and consents to do so.

* Your comments, customizations, or other content do not violate any third party’s intellectual property rights, including copyright, patent, or trademark.

* Your comments, customizations, or other content do not contain defamatory, libelous, offensive, indecent, or unlawful material, or invade the privacy of any third party.

* Your comments, customizations, or other content will not be used to solicit or promote illegal activities.

By posting comments, customizations, or other content to our Services, you grant us (including our developers and partners) an irrevocable, non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free, sublicensable license to use, reproduce, adapt, modify, publish, translate, create derivative works from, distribute, publicly perform, and publicly display such content in any form, media, or technology now known or hereafter developed.

## **Reservation of Rights and Modifications**

We reserve the right, in our sole discretion, to modify or revise these Terms at any time, and you agree to be bound by such modifications or revisions. Any such modification or modification will be effective one week after posting on the Services, and your continued use of the Services after the effective date will constitute your acceptance of and agreement to such modification or modification. If you object to any such modification or modification, your sole remedy shall be to discontinue use of the Service.

We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the Services (or any portion thereof) at any time, with or without notice, without limitation for a breach of the Terms.

## **User Prohibitions and Responsibilities**

In situations where the user performs any of the actions listed below, it may result in an automatic breach of the terms of use, which may generate consequences ranging from warnings to even removal of access to the services and cancellation of the account or access to the services, with or without prior notice:

* Assigning a real value to any virtual savings within our services and trading them for real money or goods.

* Sending any inappropriate content to the support or review teams.

* Abusing bugs or systems with the intention of gaining an advantage or damaging our structures.

* Abusing the support means.

* Attempting to circumvent any system of the services in a way that harms the functioning of the services or other users, without prior authorization from the development team.

## **Content Liability**

We will not be held legally responsible for any content that appears on our Services, as it is community-driven. In the event of intellectual property infringement or discomfort, the user may request a review or removal of one or more content by opening a removal request through our Support.

If you find any link or content on our Services that is in any way offensive or infringes your copyright, you have the right and freedom to contact us and report the issue at any time. We will consider requests to remove links and content, but we are not obligated to remove any links from our Services or to respond directly to your request, unless it infringes your copyright.

For issues related to copyright or content removal, please contact us through our official support channels.
